name: swim-send-off
description: Swim set on a send-off clock: 10×100 m freestyle 'on 1:30' at Critical Swim Speed. The send-off (not the rest) is fixed, carried as Block.scoring.scheme 'send_off' with intervalSec 90. Distance is the scored metric; the CSS pace target is an `intensity` (v0.5) — no longer hacked onto the time field.
